title: A2A Agents Roster
description: A map of role name to role preset. agents.default.json is committed; an optional gitignored agents.json fully replaces it when present.

backend.description: Which inference backend handles this role.

description.description: One-sentence summary shown to peer agents in list_agents.

systemPrompt.description: System prompt prepended to every conversation.

skills.description: Capabilities surfaced via the Agent Card.

toolCapable.description: Set true if the model supports function calling. Claude is always true; Ollama models vary.

webSearch.description: Claude backend only: expose Anthropic's server-side web_search tool.
